Package com.wip.dto

Class ParcelDto

java.lang.Object
com.wip.dto.ParcelDto
public class ParcelDto extends Object
Data Transfer Object for transferring parcel booking information between the API layer and the service layer.

This DTO carries the details required to create or update a parcel booking, including the associated customer, physical parcel attributes (weight, addresses), and booking date. Bean Validation annotations enforce data integrity at the API boundary. The shipmentId and shipmentAvailable fields are populated by the server in response payloads to indicate whether a shipment has been created for this parcel.

For regular (non-admin) users, the customerId is automatically resolved from the authenticated user's profile on the server side; admin users must supply it explicitly.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Method Details

    • getParcelId

      public Long getParcelId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this parcel.
      Returns:
      the parcel ID, or null if not yet persisted

    • setParcelId

      public void setParcelId(Long parcelId)
      Sets the unique identifier of this parcel.
      Parameters:
      parcelId - the parcel ID to assign

    • getCustomerId

      public Long getCustomerId()
      Returns the ID of the customer associated with this parcel.
      Returns:
      the customer ID

    • setCustomerId

      public void setCustomerId(Long customerId)
      Sets the ID of the customer associated with this parcel.
      Parameters:
      customerId - the customer ID to assign; must be a positive number

    • getCustomerName

      public String getCustomerName()
      Returns the display name of the customer associated with this parcel.
      Returns:
      the customer's full name, or null if not populated

    • setCustomerName

      public void setCustomerName(String customerName)
      Sets the display name of the customer associated with this parcel.
      Parameters:
      customerName - the customer name to assign

    • getReceiverPhone

      public String getReceiverPhone()
      Returns the receiver's phone number for this parcel.
      Returns:
      the receiver phone number

    • setReceiverPhone

      public void setReceiverPhone(String receiverPhone)
      Sets the receiver's phone number for this parcel.
      Parameters:
      receiverPhone - the receiver's phone number to assign

    • getWeight

      public BigDecimal getWeight()
      Returns the weight of this parcel in kilograms.
      Returns:
      the parcel weight as a BigDecimal

    • setWeight

      public void setWeight(BigDecimal weight)
      Sets the weight of this parcel in kilograms.
      Parameters:
      weight - the parcel weight to assign; must be at least 0.1

    • getSourceAddress

      public String getSourceAddress()
      Returns the source (pickup) address for this parcel.
      Returns:
      the origin address string

    • setSourceAddress

      public void setSourceAddress(String sourceAddress)
      Sets the source (pickup) address for this parcel.
      Parameters:
      sourceAddress - the origin address to assign; must not be blank

    • getDestinationAddress

      public String getDestinationAddress()
      Returns the destination (delivery) address for this parcel.
      Returns:
      the destination address string

    • setDestinationAddress

      public void setDestinationAddress(String destinationAddress)
      Sets the destination (delivery) address for this parcel.
      Parameters:
      destinationAddress - the delivery address to assign; must not be blank

    • getBookingDate

      public LocalDate getBookingDate()
      Returns the booking date for this parcel.
      Returns:
      the booking date as a LocalDate

    • setBookingDate

      public void setBookingDate(LocalDate bookingDate)
      Sets the booking date for this parcel.
      Parameters:
      bookingDate - the booking date to assign; must not be null

    • getShipmentId

      public Long getShipmentId()
      Returns the ID of the shipment associated with this parcel.
      Returns:
      the shipment ID, or null if no shipment has been created

    • setShipmentId

      public void setShipmentId(Long shipmentId)
      Sets the ID of the shipment associated with this parcel.
      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the shipment ID to assign

    • isShipmentAvailable

      public boolean isShipmentAvailable()
      Returns whether a shipment is available for this parcel.
      Returns:
      true if a shipment record exists; false otherwise

    • setShipmentAvailable

      public void setShipmentAvailable(boolean shipmentAvailable)
      Sets the shipment availability flag for this parcel.
      Parameters:
      shipmentAvailable - true if a shipment exists; false otherwise
